'''Taborah Johnson''' (born [[March 21]], [[1950s#1953|1953]]) is a [[Wikipedia:Canadians|Canadian]] voice actress who was the voice of [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] in the first season of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated television series and [[Jessica Meade]] in the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Droids'']] animated television series. Her other appearances included ''Air Waves'', ''A Holiday Romance'', ''Blood Brothers'', ''One Night Only'', ''Utilities'', ''The Big Comfy Couch'', ''Mythic Warriors'' and ''Polka Dot Door'' as well as narrating trailers for PBS Kids. She is the elder sister of [[Wikipedia:Clark Johnson|Clark]] and [[Wikipedia:Molly Johnson|Molly Johnson]].
